headline: LKQ Corporation to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on Thursday, April 30, 2026
summary: ANTIOCH, Tenn., April 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LKQ Corporation (Nasdaq: LKQ) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Conference Call Details LKQ will host a conference call and webcast on April 30, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time (7:00 a.m. Central Time) with members of senior management to discuss the Company's results. To access the investor conference call, please dial (800) 715-9871. International access to the call may be obtained by dialing (64
